scripts.build: npm run typecheck && esbuild frontend/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=src/kaleidoscope/static/index.js && esbuild frontend/styles.css --bundle --outfile=src/kaleidoscope/static/index.css
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && PATH="$PWD/.venv/bin:$PATH" hatch run test:e2e-fixture && playwright test
